assert_PhaseOrderRespected.condition:
and (phase = "CallingLLM"         implies prompt_built)
    and (phase = "ParsingResponse"    implies llm_call_count = 1)
    and (phase = "ValidatingDependsOn" implies parse_ok)
    and (phase = "ReturningResult"    implies validation_ok)
assert_PhaseOrderRespected.description: Test assertion for PhaseOrderRespected from GwtAuthor spec
